job_title: Assistant in Nursing — Residential Aged Care
summary: AIN in residential aged care delivering personal care to residents.
responsibilities: Support residents with showering, dressing and grooming
Assist with mobility including hoist transfers
Provide medication assistance under RN supervision

skill_evidence.teamwork: You work well as part of a team
skill_evidence.empathy: You bring empathy and a person-centred approach to every interaction.
skill_evidence.verbal communication: effective verbal and written communication skills
skill_evidence.written communication: effective verbal and written communication skills
skill_evidence.personal care: deliver personal care to our residents
skill_evidence.medication assistance: Provide medication assistance under the supervision of the RN
skill_evidence.clinical documentation: contribute to clinical documentation at the end of each shift
skill_evidence.showering and bathing: Support residents with showering, dressing and grooming as part of daily personal care.
